cache.description: Set false to disable result caching entirely. Defaults to true.

cache_size.description: In-process LRU cache capacity for remote-agent results. Defaults to 128. Zero disables eviction.

timeout_seconds.description: Default per-call timeout (seconds) for every remote agent. Overridable per agent and per call. Defaults to 120.

agents.description: Remote AG-UI agents to expose as delegate/subagent tools.

name.description: Human-friendly identifier for the remote agent; used to derive the default tool name.

endpoint.description: Full AG-UI POST endpoint URL (e.g. https://host/agui).

tool_name.description: Override the LLM-facing tool name. Defaults to 'delegate_agui_<name>'.

description.description: Override the tool description shown to the LLM.

bearer_token.description: Static bearer token for the Authorization header. Prefer bearer_token_env to keep secrets out of config files.

bearer_token_env.description: Name of an environment variable holding the bearer token. Read at Init; takes effect only when bearer_token is unset.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-agent default timeout (seconds), overriding the plugin-level default.
